---
title: "\'Our Flitting\'"
---

## \'Our Flitting\'
**Date:** 1864-1865
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1864-April 1865)

### Notes

Although this series of articles describes Germany and Switzerland as well as Italy, CMY referred to it as \'Italian letters\' in an answer to a correspondent <i>MP</i> (March 1865) 336, which is why it seems likely to be the \'Italian letters\' mentioned to Ann Carter Smith.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
